title: Alpha 0.0.0v
description:
A single-player modpack transforming Minecraft into something nostalgic, immersive, and unsettling. Built around The Wonderland with atmosphere and performance enhancements.
Play alone. Explore. Discover.
W3lc0m3 t0 n1ghtm@r3 m0d3.
body:
Alpha 0.0.0v README
Welcome to Alpha Test
You're about to experience Minecraft in a way you might not have in years—nostalgic, immersive, and strange.
What Is This Pack?
Just... play it. Discover it yourself.
Getting Started
First Time Setup

Launch the pack
Don't skip the initial load - Give it time to compile shaders and load resources on first launch
Create a new world
Turn on audio - Seriously. Matmos and Presence Footsteps need sound to shine
Set your difficulty and game mode preference

Recommended First Steps

SL33P SL33P SL33P
8U1LD @ 8@S1C SH3LT3R
3XPL0R3 N3@R8Y STRUCT UR3S
L1ST3N T0 TH3 @M81ENT S0UND5

How to Play

Play this alone. This is a single-player experience designed for personal discovery and immersion.
Take your time. This isn't a speedrun pack. Wander. Get lost. Let the atmosphere sink in.
Explore actively. The Wonderland has secrets. Structures have loot. Biomes have surprises.
Don't skip the audio. Play with sound on. The immersive audio design is half the experience.
Embrace the strangeness. The Wonderland is beautiful and eerie. That's intentional.

Troubleshooting
